package rulefixtures

// scenario for gzip_reader_writer_recreated_per_item: gzip.NewReader(...) or gzip.NewWriter(...) recreated inside iterative paths instead of per stream.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: hot_path; severity: info.
type Rule351NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario351Negative(records []Rule351NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
